page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.2xlarge is a general-purpose, eighth-generation instance powered by an Intel x86_64 processor. It features 8 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped from 4 physical cores with 2 threads per core, running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio.

This instance type includes 474 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store volumes, offering high-speed local storage directly attached to the host. It runs on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which offloads virtualization functions to dedicated hardware. The network configuration provides a baseline bandwidth of 12 Gbps, and the instance is optimized for both network throughput and Amazon Elastic Block Store performance.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the m8idn.2xlarge balances dedicated compute resources, high-speed local NVMe storage, and optimized networking within a single general-purpose profile. This resource density makes it suitable for workloads requiring a balance of compute and memory alongside fast local scratch space. Appropriate workloads include relational databases, caching tiers, containerized applications, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.2xlarge is a general-purpose, eighth-generation instance built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by a 3.9 GHz Intel processor. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores, 32.0 GB of memory, and 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps and is optimized for both network and EBS performance. The balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, combined with high-speed local storage, offers a cost-efficient profile for workloads that require consistent compute power and fast local data access. The m8idn.2xlarge is well-suited for general-purpose applications, containerized microservices, relational databases, and caching layers.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.2xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 8 Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of memory, 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, high-speed local NVMe SSD storage, and optimized network performance.
bullet_points: Powered by an Intel x86_64 processor with 8 vCPUs and a 3.9 GHz clock speed
Equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory and 474 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps with EBS optimization
Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor with dedicated CPU allocation
Suitable for relational databases, caching tiers, and containerized applications
